nodes.label: AI as communication efficiency tool
nodes.grounding_span: I can rely on LLMs to save me time with things like emails, texts, or pre-planning talking points

nodes.label: AI collaboration level based on task importance
nodes.label_negative: Uniform AI use regardless of importance
nodes.grounding_span: I would give more details to the model and commit to more editing when a conversation is urgent or if the customer is significant

nodes.label: AI as collaborative partner
nodes.grounding_span: I'm definitely more of a collaborative user

nodes.label: AI use threshold for efficiency
nodes.label_negative: AI use for all tasks regardless of efficiency
nodes.grounding_span: there's a certain threshold where handling something myself is more efficient

nodes.label: AI impact on personal skill maintenance
nodes.label_negative: AI use without skill degradation concern
nodes.grounding_span: I actually worry that my own skills are degrading because my instinct is to use AI for many things

nodes.label: Workplace culture around AI adoption
nodes.label_negative: Open and formal AI adoption culture
nodes.grounding_span: there's been some hesitancy from other workers... it's certainly not talked about or explored formally or informally

nodes.label: Communication quality and personalization
nodes.grounding_span: adjust the voice/phrasing into something closer to my own

nodes.label: Professional competence and skill retention
nodes.grounding_span: I actually worry that my own skills are degrading

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI for routine tasks
nodes.grounding_span: My most satisfying achievement using AI is definitely my email template system

nodes.label: Concern about skill degradation
nodes.grounding_span: I actually worry that my own skills are degrading

nodes.label: Openness to increased AI use with better capabilities
nodes.grounding_span: If that was the case, I would use it more

nodes.label: Task-importance-based effort calibration
nodes.grounding_span: I would give more details to the model and commit to more editing when a conversation is urgent

nodes.label: Collaborative iterative refinement
nodes.grounding_span: I like to outline my thoughts, then ask the model to organize... follow up with the model to change details
